data.content: Shipment review approved on main. Verified commits 5a8366c84e6c and c55f558e910f are present on origin/main; UrlStateSync restores persisted repo state and rewrites the URL when ?repo is absent; GitHub Actions CI, Changesets, and Coverage Badge all succeeded for both commits; focused regression test bun run test src/lib/__tests__/url-state-sync-reload.test.ts passed locally.
